data.title: Charles Schwab Raises Strategy (MSTR) Stake in Latest 13F Filing
data.description:
Charles Schwab Investment Management increased its position in Strategy Inc (NASDAQ: MSTR) during the fourth quarter of 2025, adding 91,859 shares to its holdings as disclosed in a Form 13F regulatory filing. The increase brings Schwab’s total position to approximately 1. 27 million shares, valued at roughly $168 million
source: https://techgaged.com/charles-schwab-raises-strategy-mstr-stake-in-latest-13f-filing/

data.title: Dust Storm Causes Fatal Highway Pileup in Southern Colorado
data.description: A severe dust storm led to a tragic highway pileup in southern Colorado on Tuesday, resulting in at least four fatalities and nearly 29 individuals being hospitalized. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting the impact of powerful winds that significantly reduced visibility, contributing to the accident. Emergency services responded swiftly to the scene, providing medical assistance and transporting injured individuals to nearby hospitals. Authorities are investigating the incident to determine the exact cause and are urging drivers to exercise caution in adverse weather conditions. The dust storm underscores the challenges faced by motorists in regions prone to sudden weather changes.

data.title: Ether bulls target $2.5K as staking ETF launch, RWA market cap reflect growth
data.description:
Ether adoption grows as major endowments shift capital, BlackRock launches a staking ETF, and Ethereum's real-world asset dominance highlights TradFi investor interest.
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/ether-bulls-target-2-5k-as-staking-etf-launch-rwa-market-cap-reflect-growth?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: Santos Plans Workforce Reduction Amid Profit Decline
data.description: Santos, Australia's second-largest natural gas producer, is aiming to reduce its workforce by 10% following a decline in profits due to lower oil and gas prices. Bloomberg posted on X that the company is responding to the challenging market conditions by implementing cost-cutting measures. The decision comes as Santos seeks to maintain its financial stability and competitiveness in the energy sector. The reduction in headcount is part of a broader strategy to streamline operations and improve efficiency. This move reflects the ongoing pressures faced by energy companies globally as they navigate fluctuating commodity prices.

data.title: S&P 500 Reports Higher Than Expected Revenue Growth for Q4
data.description: The S&P 500 index has reported a year-over-year revenue growth of 9.0% for the fourth quarter. FactSet posted on X that this figure surpasses the previous estimate of 7.8% recorded on December 31 and the earlier estimate of 6.5% from September 30. This growth indicates a stronger performance than anticipated, reflecting positive trends in the market.

data.title: Ovintiv to Sell Anadarko Assets for $3 Billion
data.description: Ovintiv has reached an agreement to sell its Anadarko oil and natural gas assets for $3 billion in cash. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting the transaction's significance in the energy sector. The buyer's identity remains undisclosed. This move is part of Ovintiv's strategy to streamline its portfolio and focus on core operations. The sale is expected to enhance the company's financial flexibility and support its long-term growth objectives. Further details about the transaction and its impact on Ovintiv's operations are anticipated in the coming months.

data.title: Evening Market Recap Provides Insightful Financial Updates
data.description: FactSet posted on X that the latest episode of the StreetAccount U.S. Evening Market Recap offers a concise overview of the day's financial market activities. The recap is designed to keep investors informed about key market movements and trends during their evening commute. This episode covers significant developments in various sectors, providing listeners with valuable insights into the current economic landscape. The recap aims to enhance understanding of market dynamics and assist investors in making informed decisions. Tune in to stay updated on the latest financial news and analysis.

data.title: Visa Partnership Enables Quantoz Payments to Issue Stablecoin-Linked Debit Cards
data.description: Dutch fintech company Quantoz Payments has achieved principal membership status with Visa, granting it the ability to issue Visa-branded virtual debit cards connected to its stablecoins USDQ, EURQ, and EURD. According to NS3.AI, this development allows Quantoz to serve as a BIN sponsor, facilitating other fintech firms in Europe to incorporate stablecoin-based card issuance into their platforms. The collaboration aims to streamline the launch of stablecoin payment services for small and medium-sized fintech enterprises across Europe by eliminating complex licensing requirements.

data.title: Investment Opportunities in India Amid Trade Deal and Budget Incentives
data.description:
India's recent trade agreement with the United States, coupled with the federal budget's incentives aimed at boosting investment, has created a favorable environment for investors. Bloomberg posted on X that experts are evaluating the best avenues for investing 10 lakh rupees in the current Indian market.

The trade deal is expected to enhance economic ties between India and the U.S., potentially leading to increased foreign investment and economic growth. The federal budget has introduced various incentives designed to attract investment in key sectors, further stimulating the economy.

Experts suggest that sectors such as technology, infrastructure, and renewable energy present promising opportunities for investment. These areas are likely to benefit from both the trade agreement and the budget incentives, offering potential for significant returns.

Investors are advised to consider the long-term growth prospects of these sectors, as well as the potential impact of the trade deal and budget measures on the broader economy. By strategically allocating funds, investors can capitalize on the favorable conditions created by these recent developments.

data.title: Trump-led American Bitcoin crosses 6,000 BTC mark as treasury firms ramp activity
data.description:
Eric Trump announced today that American Bitcoin Corp, the Trump family-backed mining and treasury firm, now formally holds 6,000 Bitcoin in its reserves, becoming one of the world’s largest corporate Bitcoin holders in less than 6 months of public trading. The firm’s co-founder and chief strategy officer (CSO) Eric Trump made the announcement on February […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/american-bitcoin-treasury-ramp-activity/

data.title: Mixed Performance for Hong Kong ADRs
data.description: Hong Kong's American Depositary Receipts (ADRs) showed varied movements. According to RTHK, Alibaba's ADR fell nearly 2% compared to its closing price in Hong Kong on Monday, while Meituan's ADR decreased by about 1%. ADRs for AIA Group and Tencent dropped by approximately 0.5% or more. In contrast, JD.com and HSBC's ADRs rose nearly 1%, and Hong Kong Exchanges and Clearing's ADR increased by less than 0.2%.

data.title: Intel Shares Decline Amid Rising AI Competition and Supply Chain Issues
data.description: Intel's stock has experienced a 7% decline recently, attributed to heightened competition in the artificial intelligence sector from companies like Nvidia, as well as persistent supply chain challenges. According to NS3.AI, the company is making significant investments in AI, including a $100 million stake in SambaNova and advancements in AI hardware projects such as the Saimemory ZAM prototype. Despite these initiatives, Wall Street maintains a cautious outlook with an overall 'Reduce' rating, citing concerns over foundry inefficiencies and supply constraints that may hinder short-term growth.

data.title: Federal Reserve's Upcoming Announcements Draw Attention
data.description: The financial world is focused on the Federal Reserve's activities scheduled for tomorrow. Bespoke Investment Group posted on X. Vice Chair Bowman is set to deliver a speech at 1 PM, followed by the release of the January Federal Open Market Committee (FOMC) minutes at 2 PM. These events are anticipated to provide insights into the Fed's future policy directions.

data.title: Expert Predicts DeFi Revival Amid Token Declines
data.description: Crypto analyst Jamie Coutts forecasts a resurgence in decentralized finance (DeFi) during the next market cycle, despite recent declines in token values. According to NS3.AI, Coutts points out that leading DeFi protocols, particularly those operating on Ethereum and Solana, are generating substantial blockchain fees, indicating their resilience. He anticipates that future cycles will focus on the tokenization of financial assets and AI-driven on-chain transactions, which could lead to more sustainable growth in the sector.

data.title: Launch of PredictionShares ETF Reflects Growing Interest in Blockchain Prediction Markets
data.description: Bitwise has submitted an application to introduce a new exchange-traded fund (ETF) focused on prediction markets, named PredictionShares. According to NS3.AI, this development was reported by Bloomberg ETF analyst James Seyffart. The initiative highlights the increasing interest in incorporating blockchain-based prediction markets into conventional financial products.

data.title: U.S. Health Official Advocates for Measles Vaccination Amid Rising Cases
data.description: Mehmet Oz, head of the US Centers for Medicare and Medicaid Services, has committed to maintaining insurance coverage for all recommended vaccinations across the nation. Bloomberg posted on X, Oz emphasized the importance of getting vaccinated against measles as the number of infections continues to rise. He urged citizens to prioritize their health by receiving the measles shot, highlighting the critical role of vaccinations in preventing outbreaks.

data.title: CME Predicts Fed Rate Decisions for Upcoming Months
data.description: The CME's FedWatch tool has provided insights into potential interest rate changes by the Federal Reserve. According to Jin10, there is a 7.9% probability that the Fed will cut rates by 25 basis points in March, while the likelihood of maintaining current rates stands at 92.1%. Looking ahead to April, the probability of a cumulative 25 basis point rate cut increases to 23.6%, with a 75.0% chance of rates remaining unchanged and a 1.5% chance of a 50 basis point cut. By June, the probability of a cumulative 25 basis point rate cut rises to 50.0%.

data.title: British Columbia to Reduce Public Sector Jobs and Increase Taxes
data.description: British Columbia is set to eliminate 15,000 public sector positions, raise taxes, and postpone certain investments. Bloomberg posted on X that despite these measures, the province's left-leaning administration has chosen not to implement significant reductions to its extensive spending programs. The government anticipates that the region's debt will continue to grow.

data.title: Western Digital Aims to Raise $3.09 Billion from Sandisk Stake Sale
data.description: Western Digital is planning to generate $3.09 billion by selling a stake in Sandisk. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting that this move comes nearly a year after the company separated its flash memory division. The sale is part of Western Digital's strategy to optimize its business operations and focus on core areas. The decision reflects the company's ongoing efforts to streamline its portfolio and enhance financial flexibility. Western Digital's actions are closely watched by industry analysts as they could impact the digital storage market dynamics.
